news.t: EU to propose 21st package of sanctions targeting Russia's banks

holdings.infoBox: EWK is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Anheuser-Busch InBev stock at 21.67%, argenx SE at 14.79%, UCB SA at 9.04%, KBC Group NV at 4.56%, and ageas at 4.19%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Belgium ETF (EWK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Belgium IMI 25/50 index. The fund tracks a market-cap weighted index of Belgian securities subject to RIC constraints. EWK was launched on Mar 12, 1996 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: EU to propose 21st package of sanctions targeting Russia's banks
data.text: The EU is set to propose a 21st ​package of sanctions against Russia ‌for its war in Ukraine on Wednesday targeting the country's bank and crypto networks to ​increase the chances of a ​banking crisis...
